response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned Staff-level engineer with strong TypeScript and AWS foundations and directly relevant Model Context Protocol work at re:cinq, which aligns with one of the role's key technologies. However, the core requirement of 8+ years of production AI experience is not met — AI and agentic work appears confined to his current role started in April 2025. Python is absent from his skills entirely, vector databases and RAG architectures are never mentioned, and there is no evidence of enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or multi-agent framework experience (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.). The breadth of his engineering career is a genuine asset, but the depth in GenAI-specific domains falls well short of staff-level expectations for this role.
strengths: Direct hands-on experience building MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, one of the role's listed key technologies
Long staff-level engineering career spanning systems, data integration at scale (millions of req/s at Dunnhumby), and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK), providing strong production credibility

Demonstrated ability to lead and mentor through recurring Refactoring Dojos, Selenium courses, and conference talks, indicating readiness for the mentorship and engineering-excellence responsibilities
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume and skills list despite being a primary required language for the role
No mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLMs, or multi-agent frameworks anywhere in the resume — the core GenAI stack is unaddressed
The 8+ years of production AI experience requirement is not satisfied; AI and agentic work is limited to the current role begun April 2025, roughly one month of tenure at time of review
